messages.content:
Translate to English

"都道府県	奈良県
肩書き	葛城市マスコットキャラクター
攻略難易度	★★やや易。M-1にも挑戦した奈良県を代表するゆるキャラ。活動はまだまだ関西圏中心のようです。
公式サイト	http://www.city.katsuragi.nara.jp/renkachan/"

Prefecture: Nara Prefecture
Title: Katsuragi City Mascot Character
Difficulty level: ★★ Slightly easy. Representing Nara Prefecture, which has also challenged in M-1, this character is known for being cute and laid-back. Their activities still seem to be mainly centered around the Kansai region.
Official website: http://www.city.katsuragi.nara.jp/renkachan/
